_comment: x402 paywall pricing per endpoint. Values are in microUSDC (1e6 == $1). Hot-reloadable: changes take effect on next request. Contract documented in docs/services/x402_as_a_service.md §6.

free_quota._comment: Per-wallet free-call allowance on cost-center endpoints. Resets every 24h rolling window. Anonymous callers get 0 free calls (must pay every time).

/coordinator/backlog/process.description: Pops + processes one item, may chain calls

/agents/{agent_id}/evolve.description: Full directive loop, up to N LLM calls

/bankon/identity/provision.description: One-time vault provisioning + optional on-chain mint

base._comment: USDC on Base. EIP-3009 transferWithAuthorization. Default fastest-cheapest EVM rail.
base._payTo_note: Replace 0x000…000 with the BankonPaymentRouter address on Base after deploy. Until then the facilitator rejects settlement attempts on this rail and clients should pick Tempo or Algorand.

tempo._comment: USDC.e on Tempo. Multi-Party Payment chain. Used when settlement requires more than one signer (e.g. DAO-controlled treasury).
tempo._payTo_note: Tempo USDC.e contract + payee address pending Tempo mainnet deploy.

algorand-mainnet._comment: USDC ASA on Algorand Mainnet. Sub-second finality, $0.001 per transaction. Non-EVM rail.
algorand-mainnet._payTo_note: Empty payTo means this rail is currently advertised but not yet settling. Fill in the Algorand payee address (58-char base32) after the aORC minter is deployed.

facilitator._comment: mindX-hosted facilitator. Callers may verify with any compatible facilitator and present the proof; mindX re-verifies on-chain before honoring it.

idempotency._comment: Verified settlements are cached for 60s so a network retry (same X-PAYMENT) within the window does not double-charge.
